# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why it matters.

## Changes

- List the key changes made in this PR.
- Keep each item focused and reviewable.

## Related issues

Closes #(issue number) or references relevant discussions/ADRs.

## Testing

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && python -m pytest tests/`).
- [ ] Frontend lint passes (`cd frontend && npm run lint`).
- [ ] Frontend E2E tests pass (`cd frontend && npm run test:e2e`).
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, architecture, deployment, developer guide, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines.
- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commits style.
- [ ] I have verified that internal links and Mermaid diagrams render correctly.
